patch.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG and gain 3 stacks of {Sin Mark}. After playing, shuffle this card into the top of the Draw Pile. On the {ordinal:3rd} play, {Exhaust} and make your next Command Card benefit from the {Atonement by Pain} effect, applying it 2 times.

records.descriptionTemplate: Roll a [Arg2]-sided die, gain Temporary {STR} equal to the die roll*[Arg1]. If the roll is 4 or higher, {Vulnerable} all enemies for 1 turn. If the roll is 6 or higher, the gained Temporary {STR} is doubled.

Roll a [Arg2]-sided die, gain Temporary {STR} equal to the die roll*[Arg1]. If the roll is 4 or higher, Inflict {Weakness} and {Vulnerable} on all enemies for 1 turn. If the roll is 6 or higher, double the gained Temporary {STR} and obtain 1 Arithmetica.
Heal with blood. After dealing Damage, lose 10% of current HP and gain an equivalent amount of healing from the {Crimson Furnace}.
Pain for pain. Consume all remaining Healing from the {Crimson Furnace}, each point consumed increases DMG dealt by 3 (9 during a Boss Battle).

{Redemption} through faith. Consume all remaining Healing from the {Crimson Furnace} to gain a Shield equal to 150% of the consumed amount. This Shield is unaffected by Shield Bonuses or Debuffs and ignores Shield Caps.

Can be played by consuming 500 Keyflare when Arithmetica is insufficient. Deal 6 instances of [Damage:Arg1] {Pierce DMG}. You can choose one out of six {Memories} to trigger its effect; this "Memory" cannot be selected again during this exploration.
